title: Hour of Death
writer: Federico De Urrutia, Joaquín Luis Romero Marchent, Manuel Sebares
actors: Paul Piaget, Robert Hundar, Fernando Sancho
plot: Bob Carey, just released from prison, learns that his fiancee Maria has married rich farmer Cifford. But she is mortally ill and Bob agrees to accompany the couple to a surgeon in Laredo, passing through Apache territory and the d...
